transparent)}.sbx-divider-label{font-size:11px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:.22em;text-transform:uppercase;color:rgba(74,59,54,0.58)}.sbx-badge-text{display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;width:100%;height:100%;font-size:12px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:.12em;text-transform:uppercase;color:rgba(122,88,80,0.95)}.sbx-resize{position:absolute;right:-7px;bottom:-7px;width:14px;height:14px;border-radius:999px;background:#C27D7D;border:2px solid rgba(255,252,250,0.94);box-shadow:0 10px 24px rgba(196,154,154,0.24);cursor:nwse-resize;display:none;}.sbx-lock-flag{position:absolute;left:12px;bottom:12px;padding:4px 9px;border-radius:999px;background:rgba(74,59,54,0.82);font-size:10px;letter-spacing:.08em;text-transform:uppercase;color:rgba(255,248,244,0.92);display:none;}.sbx-guide-x,.sbx-guide-y{position:absolute;pointer-events:none;opacity:0;z-index:29}.sbx-guide-x{left:0;right:0;height:1px;background:rgba(194,125,125,0.42)}.sbx-guide-y{top:0;bottom:0;width:1px;background:rgba(194,125,125,0.42)}.sbx-toast{position:absolute;left:50%;bottom:16px;transform:translateX(-50%) translateY(8px);padding:10px 14px;border-radius:999px;background:rgba(74,59,54,0.9);color:rgba(255,248,244,0.96);font-size:12px;letter-spacing:.02em;box-shadow:0 18px 36px rgba(90,66,58,0.24);opacity:0;pointer-events:none;transition:opacity .16s ease,transform .16s ease;z-index:80}.sbx-toast.show{opacity:1;transform:translateX(-50%) translateY(0)}@media (max-width:720px){.sbx-option-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr}.sbx-split,.sbx-split.reverse{grid-template-columns:1fr}}.sbx-fold-box{margin-top:10px}.sbx-fold-box details[open]{border-color:rgba(194,125,125,0.56)}.sbx-fold-box summary{cursor:pointer;font-weight:700;color:#C27D7D;font-size:12px;list-style:none;outline:none;user-select:none}.sbx-fold-box summary::-webkit-details-marker{display:none}.sbx-fold-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:10px;padding-top:8px}.sbx-fold-item span{display:block;font-size:10px;color:rgba(74,59,54,0.52);margin-bottom:2px;font-weight:bold}.sbx-fold-item regex_scripts.scriptName: 状态栏模板-1：塞斯莱雅·晨星
regex_scripts.replaceString:
塞斯莱雅·晨星
时间|当前时间
地点|当前位置
服装|当前角色穿着
好感度50/100

樱唇
显示当前角色嘴唇的状态

酥胸
把多个区域分开，让状态栏更有呼吸感。

蜜穴
把多个区域分开，让状态栏更有呼吸感。

双腿
把多个区域分开，让状态栏更有呼吸感。

玉足
把多个区域分开，让状态栏更有呼吸感。

菊穴
把多个区域分开，让状态栏更有呼吸感。

'\u9ad8\u98ce\u9669';return value||'\u4e2d\u98ce\u9669';};var typeLabel=function(value){var key=String(value||'normal').toLowerCase();if(key==='safe')return '\u7a33\u59a5';if(key==='risky')return '\u5192\u9669';if(key==='opportunity')return '\u673a\u4f1a';if(key==='normal')return '\u5e38\u89c4';return value||'\u5e38\u89c4';};var boxes=document.querySelectorAll('.z-status-box,.sbx-box');var boxIndex=-1;for(var bi=0;bi<boxes.length;bi++){if(boxes[bi]===box){boxIndex=bi;break;}}var allowEnvInherit=true;var allowStateInherit=true;var allowImageInherit=true;var nodes;};var firstNode=function(selector,currentOnly){var nodes=collectDataNodes(selector,currentOnly);return nodes[0]||null;};var attrFromNodes=function(nodes,key){for(var i=0;i<nodes.length;i++){var nodes=qa('i[slot]',data);for(var i=0;i<nodes.length;i++){if((nodes[i].getAttribute('slot')||'')===slot)return nodes[i];}return null;};var direct=scan(box);if(direct)return direct;if(!allowImageInherit)return null;for(var j=boxIndex-1;j>=0;j--){var prev=scan(boxes[j]);if(prev)return prev;}return null;};var nodeTexts=function(node,selector){if(!node)return[];return i=0;i<items.length;i++){var el=render(items[i],i);if(el)host.appendChild(el);}};var
